note: Hand-entered San Diego Memorial Day weekend events (May 23-25, 2026). Confirm details on each venue's site before going.

events.title: Fort Rosecrans Memorial Day Ceremony
events.description: One of San Diego's largest Memorial Day commemorations. Wreaths and floral arrangements decorate veterans' graves overlooking San Diego Bay, with live patriotic music and a memorial program.
events.venue: Fort Rosecrans National Cemetery, 1700 Cabrillo Memorial Drive

events.title: USS Midway Legacy Week — Memorial Day Weekend
events.description: Legacy Week aboard the USS Midway is the centerpiece of San Diego's Memorial Day celebrations. Programming includes military displays, a Top Gun 40th Anniversary celebration on the Flight Deck, and the Remembrance Wall.
events.venue: USS Midway Museum, 910 N Harbor Drive

events.title: USS Midway Legacy Week — Memorial Day Weekend
events.description: Sunday of Legacy Week at the USS Midway: military displays, Top Gun 40th Anniversary on the Flight Deck, live performances, Remembrance Wall.
events.venue: USS Midway Museum, 910 N Harbor Drive

events.title: USS Midway Memorial Day Ceremony
events.description: Traditional Memorial Day ceremony aboard the USS Midway, followed by live performances and Legacy Week programming including the Top Gun 40th celebration on the Flight Deck.
events.venue: USS Midway Museum, 910 N Harbor Drive
